name: Hotel Royal Limited
summary: Hotel Royal Limited, an investment holding company, operates in the hotelier business. The company operates through Hotel Operations, Property Investments, and Financial Investments segments. It owns, operates, and manages 7 hotels in Singapore, Malaysia, and Thailand. The company is also involved in owning and letting out residential buildings, office units, factory units, shopping centers, and car park lots in Singapore, Malaysia, and New Zealand. In addition, it invests in portfolio of shares, bonds, and funds. The company was incorporated in 1968 and is based in Singapore.
